name: Tiramisu#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip heavy cream until stiff.
2. Whisk egg yolks with 1/4 cup sugar until pale yellow.
3. Add mascarpone and whisk until mixed well.
4. Gradually fold in the stiffly beaten heavy cream until all is incorporated.
5. Pour half of the cheese mixture into a serving dish, spreading evenly.
6. Mix coffee with Kahlua, rum, and 2 tablespoons sugar.
7. Dip lady fingers one at a time into the coffee mixture until they absorb some liquid but remain slightly crisp.
8. Arrange soaked lady fingers over the cheese layer in the dish.
9. Spread remaining cheese mixture over the top of the lady fingers.
10. Smooth with the back of a spoon.
11. Chop bittersweet chocolate and sprinkle over the top.
12. Chill for at least 6 hours before serving.
